name: material-evidence-consistency-guard
description: Checks consistency signals across product attributes, detail-page claims, and test-report evidence before human review; it does not make legal judgments or automate approval.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-review consistency checks for product evidence.
interface.longDescription: Helps prepare human review by recording consistency-check run metadata for product attributes, detail-page claims, and test-report evidence. It does not make legal determinations or automatically approve listings.
